positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical stylized illustration of a stylized cosmic forest landscape at twilight. The scene features giant bioluminescent mushrooms and crystalline trees that curve into graceful, flowing patterns. The ground is scattered with geometric, glowing nebula particles. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with ethereal sci-fi, emphasizing smooth, thick black outlines and bold, complementary color blocking (deep sapphire blues, electric violets, and neon turquoise accents). The composition is centered and highly decorative, perfect for a repeat apparel print. The overall mood is mystical and serene. Studio shot, concept art, vector illustration, high saturation, clean digital painting, maximalist pattern design.
